# (PART) Manual of Practice {-} 

# Introduction

Author1, Author2, and Author3

<span style="color: red;">ALL CONTENT IN THIS REPORT IS PRELIMINARY AND DRAFT. DO NOT REFERENCE FOR ANY PURPOSE.</span>

Key topics:  

- Need for engineering-oriented NBS guidance: alternatives analysis, performance-based
design, constructability considerations.  
- How will the manual be delivered: modular, adaptable, accessible.  
- Audience: engineers involved in analysis and design.  
- Geography: US economic and legal context, but international technical applicability.

## Example Heading 2

Content goes here.  

## Example Heading 2

Content goes here.  

### Example Subheading

Content goes here. 

```{r fig-ASCE1, fig.cap="Example of a figure"}
knitr::include_graphics("images/00_ASCE_logo.png")
```

## Example Heading 3

Content goes here.
